example: We learn the alphabet in English class every day.
translation: 我们每天在英语课上学习字母表。

meaning: v.享受......的乐趣；喜欢；欣赏；喜爱
example: I enjoy playing football with my friends after school.
translation: 我喜欢放学后和朋友们踢足球。

example: Everyone in our class likes our English teacher.
translation: 我们班的每个人都喜欢我们的英语老师。

meaning: adj.有趣的；使人快乐的 n.乐趣；快乐
example: Playing games with family is so much fun.
translation: 和家人一起玩游戏非常有趣。

example: Hey, let's go to the park this weekend.
translation: 嘿，这个周末我们去公园吧。

meaning: adj.近的 prep.靠近；在......附近 adv.近 地；接近地
example: My home is near the school, so I walk to school every day.
translation: 我家离学校很近，所以我每天步行上学。

example: I bought a new notebook for my English class.
translation: 我为英语课买了一个新笔记本。

example: I often play ping-pong with my father on weekends.
translation: 我经常在周末和爸爸打乒乓球。

example: We have a lot of fun at school with our classmates.
translation: 我们在学校和同学们一起玩得很开心。

example: We shake hands when we meet new people.
translation: 当我们遇到新朋友时，我们握手。

meaning: prep.到......时；直到......为止 conj.到 ......时；直到......为止
example: We study until 5 o'clock in the afternoon.
I always ask my teacher when I don't understand.
translation: 当我不明白时，我总是问老师。

meaning: adv.以前；之前，过去 prep.在......以前 ；先于 conj.在......以前
example: We should wash our hands before meals.
My mother is always busy with housework.

meaning: v.（一次）通话；，名叫，叫作，称作 ；打电话 n.打电话
example: I will call you after school.
translation: 放学后我会给你打电话。

meaning: n.(只读)光盘驱动器；只读光盘
example: We use a CD-ROM to learn English words.
translation: 我们使用光盘来学习英语单词。

example: My mother and I do shopping every Sunday.
translation: 我和妈妈每个星期天都去购物。

meaning: adj.激动的；兴奋的 v.使兴奋；使激动 ；excite的过去式和过去分词
example: I am excited about the upcoming summer holiday.
translation: 我对即将到来的暑假感到兴奋。

meaning: v.到达；得到；接到；获得；使做（某事 ）；收到；变得
example: I get up at 7 o'clock every morning.
It is important to study hard.
My father bought me a new mobile phone.
translation: 爸爸给我买了一部新手机。

meaning: n.（某事发生的）时刻，时候；片刻；瞬 间
example: Wait a moment, I need to finish my homework.
translation: 等一下，我需要完成我的作业。

meaning: 在那边（离自己有一定距离），在那儿
example: The library is over there, next to the playground.
translation: 图书馆在那边，操场旁边。

example: There is a phone box on the street corner.
I received a phone call from my friend yesterday.
translation: 昨天我收到了朋友的电话。

meaning: n.（电视或广播的）节目；计划，方案 ；程序 v.安排；计划；编程
example: I like watching English programmes on TV.
translation: 我喜欢在电视上看英语节目。

example: See you tomorrow, have a good night!
I want to buy something for my mother's birthday.
translation: 我想为妈妈的生日买些东西。

example: I saw a squirrel in the park yesterday.
translation: 昨天我在公园里看到了一只松鼠。

meaning: n.故事书；儿童故事书，童话书
example: My favourite storybook is about a little rabbit.
translation: 我最喜欢的故事书是关于一只小兔子的。

example: Wait a moment, I need to put on my coat.
translation: 等一下，我需要穿上外套。

example: We can learn English from a lot of websites.
translation: 我们可以从很多网站学习英语。

meaning: n.工作；著作，（音乐艺术）作品 v.（使 ）工作；（使）运转；操作；经营；起作 用
example: My father goes to work at 8 o'clock every morning.
translation: 我爸爸每天早上8点去上班。

meaning: adj.有毛病的；错误的；有问题的 n.错误 adv.错误地
example: I made a wrong answer in the test.
translation: 我在考试中犯了一个错误。

meaning: adj.北极的 n.北极,北极地区
example: Polar bears live in the Arctic.
The bus came to a stop in front of the school.
translation: 公共汽车在学校前面停了下来。

meaning: adj.早的；提早的；早期的；早到的 adv.早地；提早；在早期；提前
example: I get up early to exercise every day.
We should protect the earth.

meaning: n.钓⻥；捕⻥业（或活动） v.钓⻥；捕⻥ ；fish的现在分词
example: My grandfather likes fishing in the lake.
translation: 我爷爷喜欢在湖里钓鱼。

example: We will go fishing this weekend.
translation: 这个周末我们将去钓鱼。

example: I often visit my grandad on weekends.
translation: 我经常在周末去看望爷爷。

example: My grandma makes delicious cakes for me.
translation: 我奶奶为我做美味的蛋糕。

meaning: n.(grandfather)爷爷，外公；祖父；外 祖父
example: My grandpa tells me stories every night.
translation: 我爷爷每天晚上给我讲故事。

example: I saw a hare running in the field.
translation: 我看到一只野兔在田野里奔跑。

example: We climbed the hill to see the sunset.
I like eating ice cream in summer.
translation: 我喜欢在夏天吃冰淇淋。

example: We went boating on the lake last Sunday.
translation: 上周日我们在湖上划船。

example: The North Pole is very cold.
Polar bears are white and live in the Arctic.
translation: 北极熊是白色的，生活在北极。

meaning: v.拉；扯；拖；牵；拔 n.拉；拖；牵；拔
example: Can you help me pull this box?
translation: 你能帮我拉这个箱子吗？

meaning: n.海豹；印章 v.密封；封上
example: I saw a seal at the zoo.
translation: 我在动物园看到了一只海豹。

meaning: phrase.商业区；大商场；大型购物中心
example: We went to the shopping mall to buy clothes.
translation: 我们去购物中心买衣服。

example: It snows a lot in winter.
The South Pole is the coldest place on earth.
translation: 南极是地球上最冷的地方。

meaning: auxv.将要，会；愿意 v.愿意；遗赠 n.意 志；意愿；遗嘱
example: I will study hard to get good grades.
translation: 我会努力学习以取得好成绩。

example: I want to be a detective when I grow up.
translation: 我长大后想成为一名侦探。

meaning: adj.不同的，不一样的，有区别的
example: My sister and I have different hobbies.
translation: 我和姐姐有不同的爱好。

example: English is an interesting subject.
translation: 英语是一门有趣的学科。

example: Kung Fu Panda is a very popular movie.
translation: 《功夫熊猫》是一部非常受欢迎的电影。

example: I love spending time in nature.
translation: 我喜欢在大自然中度过时光。

meaning: adv.只；仅仅；只有 adj.唯一的；仅有的
example: I have only one brother.

meaning: adj.浪漫的，关于爱情的 n.浪漫的人
example: The movie is very romantic.

meaning: informalscifiabbr.SF科幻小说(或影片 等)
example: I like reading science fiction books.
There are many stars in the sky at night.
translation: 晚上天空中有许多星星。

meaning: adj.甜蜜的；甜的；含糖的；可爱的 n.糖 果；甜⻝
example: I like eating sweet food.

meaning: n.电视，电视机；电视节目；电视行业
example: We watch television together as a family.
Let's watch the telly after dinner.
There are thousands of books in the library.

meaning: adj.符合事实的；真实的；真的；确实的 ；真正的；实质的 n.真相
example: It is true that hard work pays off.
translation: 努力工作会有回报，这是真的。

example: I usually go to bed at 9 o'clock.
I want to be a teacher when I grow up.
translation: 我长大后想成为一名教师。

meaning: n.一会儿；一段时间 conj.（对比两件事 物）然而；与同时；在期间；当......的时 候；尽管；然而
example: I do my homework while my mother cooks dinner.
translation: 我妈妈做饭时，我做作业。

meaning: adv.向前面，向前；在前面；提前
example: There is a bookstore ahead.

meaning: prep.在......旁边，在......近旁；在旁边 ；在附近
example: My school is beside the park.
I wait for the bus at the bus stop.
There is a beautiful church in our town.
translation: 我们镇上有一座美丽的教堂。

meaning: phrase.劳驾；请原谅；对不起；麻烦你 ；打扰一下
example: Excuse me, can you tell me the way to the school?
translation: 对不起，你能告诉我去学校的路吗？

example: My grandmother was in the hospital last week.

meaning: adv.刚才；方才；只是；只不过；正好 ；恰好；就；仅仅；刚刚 adj.公正的；正 当的；合理的
example: I just finished my homework.

meaning: adj.迟的；晚的；近日暮的；近深夜的 ；时间不早的；已故的 adv.晚；迟
example: I was late for school this morning.
translation: 今天早上我上学迟到了。

meaning: adj.左边的 v.离开；leave的过去式和过 去分词 n.左；左边 adv.向左；在左边
example: Turn left at the traffic lights.
We visited the science museum last weekend.
translation: 上周末我们参观了科学博物馆。

example: Our neighbour is very friendly.

meaning: adj.（时间）紧接着的；接下来的，下一 个的，离得最近的 adv.随后 pron.下一 个 prep.靠近
example: The next lesson is English.

meaning: phrase.紧挨着的；紧靠......旁边，在 ......旁边，与......相邻
example: My house is next to the supermarket.

meaning: prep.在......上面；关于；到......上面 ；在（某位置）
example: The book is on the desk.

meaning: prep.与......相对，与相反；在对面 adj.对面的；另一边的 n.反面；对立面 ，对立的人（或物） adv.在相反的位置
example: The bank is opposite the post office.

meaning: adj.过去的；以往的；昔日的 prep.经过 ；超过；晚于 n.过去；昔日 adv.经过
example: Go past the park and you will see the school.
translation: 经过公园，你会看到学校。

example: The police station is on Main Street.
I need to go to the post office to send a letter.

meaning: adj.右边的；正确的；（意⻅或判断）准 确，确切，恰当 n.权利；右边 adv.正确 地；直接地；向右 v.扶直；纠正
example: Turn right at the corner.

meaning: n.一面；一边；一侧；一方(的意⻅态度 立场)
example: There are trees on both sides of the road.

meaning: adj.直的；笔直的；正直的；率直的 adv.直；径直；直接;立即；笔直地；成 直线地
example: Go straight for two blocks.

meaning: v.告诉；讲，讲述，叙述；说；辨别
example: Can you tell me a story?
We went to the tourist office for information.
translation: 我们去旅游咨询处获取信息。

example: There are many shops in our town.
My father works at the train station.

meaning: n.婴儿；幼兽；幼⻦ adj.幼小的
example: My aunt has a cute baby.
translation: 我阿姨有一个可爱的婴儿。

meaning: adv.坏地；严重地；非常；差；极度
example: I did badly in the math test.
translation: 我在数学考试中做得很差。

example: Blood is red.

meaning: n.小船，小艇，小舟 v.划船；用船运输 ；用船装运
example: We went for a boat ride on the river.
We have a party on Children's Day.
translation: 我们在儿童节举行聚会。

meaning: n.城市，都市 adj.清晰的；清楚的；晴朗的；明确的
example: I live in a big city.

meaning: ；清澈的;无云的；清晰易懂的 v.清理 ；清除；放晴；使明确;移走，搬走 adv.清楚地；彻底地
example: The sky is clear today.

meaning: v.关（⻔窗等）；关闭；使接近；（在空 间时间上）接近 adj.接近的；亲密的；密 切的；严密的 adv.接近地；紧挨地
example: Please close the door when you leave.
It is cloudy today.

meaning: phrase.出现；跟随；进步；（催促）赶 快；（和某人）一起去
example: Come along, we are going to the park.

meaning: adj.很好的；晴朗的；健康的；美好的 adv.很好 n.罚款
example: The weather is fine today.

meaning: v.受伤；（使）疼痛 n.伤痛 adj.受伤的
example: I hurt my knee when I fell.
We went to an island for our holiday.
translation: 我们去了一个岛屿度假。

example: I want to try jet-skiing this summer.
translation: 今年夏天我想尝试喷气式滑艇。

meaning: pron.最多，大多数；大部分；几乎所有 adj.最多的；大多数的 adv.最多，最大 ；大多数
example: Most students like playing games.
translation: 大多数学生喜欢玩游戏。

meaning: adj.附近的；邻近的 adv.在附近；附近
example: There is a supermarket nearby.
I pass by the park every day.
It is going to rain tomorrow.

meaning: n.摇滚乐；岩；岩石 v.（使）轻轻摇晃 ；（使）摇动，摆动，摇摆；震撼；（使 ）摇晃
example: There are many rocks on the beach.
We played in the sand at the beach.
translation: 我们在海滩的沙子里玩耍。

meaning: n.（潜水艇或潜水者的）通气管 v.戴潜水 通气管潜泳；徒手潜水
example: I bought a new snorkel for my trip.
translation: 我为旅行买了一个新的通气管。

meaning: v.潜泳，徒手潜水；snorkel的现在分词
example: We went snorkelling in the sea.
I found a starfish on the beach.
translation: 我在海滩上发现了一只海星。

example: The sun is shining brightly.

meaning: adj.晴朗的；阳光充足的，阳光明媚的
example: It is sunny today.
I like ice cream too.
There are many tourists in our city.

meaning: adj.有⻛的；刮⻛的，⻛大的；多⻛的 ；空谈的；吹牛的
example: It is windy today.

meaning: n.冒险；历险；奇遇；冒险经历
example: I had an exciting adventure in the forest.
translation: 我在森林里有一次激动人心的冒险。

meaning: adj.害怕的；担心的，恐惧的，忧虑的
example: I am afraid of dogs.
What is your age?
I met her three days ago.

meaning: adv.独自；单独 adj.独自的；孤独的
example: I don't like being alone.
My mother works at the bank.
Don't be afraid of making mistakes.
I wear boots in winter.
He was born to be a singer.
There is a cactus in the living room.

meaning: n.外套；大衣；皮毛 v.给......穿上外衣 ；覆盖
example: I wear a warm coat in winter.
translation: 我在冬天穿一件暖和的外套。

example: He wears a cowboy hat.

meaning: adj.昏暗的；深色的黑暗的；暗色的 n.黑 暗；夜；暗色，暗处
example: It gets dark at 6 o'clock in winter.
I am good at playing basketball.

meaning: n.地面；土地；场地；根据 v.磨碎 ；grind的过去式和过去分词
example: The ground is wet after the rain.
Hands up if you know the answer.
translation: 如果你知道答案，就举手。

meaning: n.男主人公；英雄；偶像；男主⻆
example: Superman is my hero.
I don't like watching horror films.
It is very hot in summer.

meaning: adj.最后的；最近的；上一个的；刚过去 的，最近过去的 adv.最后；最近 v.持续
example: Last week we went to the zoo.

meaning: n.烙饼；薄饼；薄烤饼；薄煎饼
example: My mother makes delicious pancakes for breakfast.
translation: 我妈妈早餐做美味的煎饼。

meaning: adj.骄傲的，自豪的，得意的，妄自尊大 的
example: I am proud of my achievements.
translation: 我为我的成就感到自豪。

meaning: v.骑；骑⻢，骑⻋；驾驶；搭乘；乘坐 （游乐设施）；航行，漂浮 n.骑；供乘 骑的游乐设施;短途旅程
example: I ride my bike to school every day.
The police caught the robber.

meaning: n.郡⻓；行政司法⻓官；警⻓；县治安官
example: The sheriff is in charge of the town.
translation: 治安官负责管理这个城镇。

meaning: adj.矮的，个子矮的；短的 adj.短暂的
example: I am short but I can jump high.
translation: 我个子矮但我能跳得高。

example: My mother makes delicious soup.

meaning: adj.强壮的；健壮的；强的，强大的；浓 烈的
example: My father is very strong.
She is a good swimmer.
My sister is thin.

meaning: v.担心；担忧；发愁；使担忧，使发愁 n.令人担忧的事；担心；忧虑
example: Don't worry, everything will be fine.
